Tell me about his e-Governance experience

Aditya has experience in delivering and maintaining backend systems for large-scale government e-Governance platforms across multiple Indian states. His experience includes:

* Building scalable REST APIs with Node.js, Fastify, Express.js, and PostgreSQL
* Improving system performance by 70% through query optimization and indexing
* Implementing secure User Access Management (UAM) with Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) and Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP)
* Integrating payment gateways and government systems (RTPS, RMS, CCTNS)
* Developing document management and PDF watermarking pipelines
* Automating background processing using cron jobs
* Ensuring production stability through load testing (JMeter)
* Improving deployment reliability using Docker and Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD)

He gained this experience during his tenure as a Software Engineer at Quantela Inc, from May 15, 2023, to present.
What projects has he built?
